evidence.source_title: Journalist who infiltrated Tehran regime is new head of We Believe in Israel — The Jewish Chronicle
evidence.description: The Jewish Chronicle reports that Perez-Shakdam became the director/head of We Believe in Israel, an Israeli advocacy organization, following her public disclosure of her Jewish identity in November 2021.

editorial_notes: Appointed director/head of We Believe in Israel following her November 2021 public disclosure.
